programme.desc: La llegada del bebé de Martina a la casa de los López se torna en una pesadilla cuando nadie puede dormir debido al llanto del pequeño. La Nena encuentra mensajes indiscretos en el celular de Aldolfo y cree que le es infiel.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: El hermano perdido y no reconocido de Plácido llega a casa de los López para quedarse. Plutarco olvida el cumpleaños de Gaby y tiene que buscar un buen regalo para compensar su error.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Al intentar limpiar la computadora de Don Justo, Plutarco compra cientos de acciones a su nombre. Justito descubre que Gaby puede jugar ajedrez y la inscriben en un torneo para así solucionar los problemas económicos de los López.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: Le toca bailar con la más fea
programme.desc: Don Justo jubila a Plácido y no le da nada de pensión. Los López tratan de buscar una solución para poder vivir ahora que Plácido no tiene trabajo. Plutarco planea exigirle un buen trato a Don Justo.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Albertano le confiesa a Lucha que está enamorado de María y quiere casarse con ella. María debe decidir si quedarse con Albertano o iniciar una vida al lado de un nuevo amor.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María de Todos los Ángeles es una mujer que siente que se está haciendo vieja sin haber encontrado el amor de su vida. Ella tiene un sueño en el que los ángeles anuncian que pronto el amor de su vida va a llegar.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche: Viaje a Cancún
programme.desc: El camino a Cancún resulta una pesadilla para Ludovico y Flavio. Mientras tanto, Federica y Martina se encuentran en Cancún buscando a sus maridos.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los chicos de RBD sufren porque en el avión en el que viajan tienen unas terribles turbulencias provocadas por una tormenta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los muchachos de RBD llegan a Puerto Vallarta para reunirse con los otros estudiantes del colegio. Los estudiantes conviven haciendo diversas actividades en la playa. Diego reta a Javier a una carrera en moto acuática y el ganador se queda con Rob.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel encuentra a Mía platicando con Lucca en la alberca. Giovanni consigue botellas de licor para la fiesta en la playa. Mía habla con Celina y Vico y vuelven a ser mejores amigas.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Antes de regresar, los alumnos hacen una última actividad en el mar. Miguel manda a Santos a investigar a Mia, pero ella se da cuenta e inventa que se acostó con Luca. Martín le confiesa sus intenciones amorosas a Carla.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel le exige una explicación a Mia sobre Luca. Roberta le advierte a Diego que si Mia y Miguel siguen peleando, se terminará RBD. Javier le inventa a Roberta que Diego anda diciendo que la puede tener cuando quiera.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón le advierte a José que no siga investigando sobre él Javier amenaza a Diego Roberta rechaza a Diego cuando le pide que sea su novia Roberta es castigada por entrar al cuarto de Diego José le dice a Gastón que ya sabe que es su tutor.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón niega ser el tutor de José Diego y Miguel le llevan serenata a Mia y Roberta, pero ellas lo toman como una burla Pilar les dice a los alumnos que su papá ya corrió a Reverte Roberta le pide a Alma que la lleve a casa de su papá.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta busca a Reverte para pedirle que juntos aprendan a tratarse como padre e hija. Santos le dice a Mia que la forma de demostrar amor es perdonando. Mia le pide a Rocco que persiga y grabe a su papá, porque quiere saber quién es su novia.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Malaver acosa y vigila a Esmeralda y a su hijo. Ella sospecha que el hombre que la sigue es Lucio y le pide a Dominga que lo describa.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Don Jorge amarra a Camila para que no escape, pero ella logra salir de ahí. Días después, Camila es apresada por piratas.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre: Sin máscaras
programme.desc: Gardenia sufre al ver a Eduardo besarse con Erika. Fernanda lleva a cabo sus planes para demostrar que Flor no es una estafadora. Jaime le asegura a Fernanda que Flor fue su novia. Steve le pide a Eduardo que no se case con Erika.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Esmeralda lleva a su bebé al hospital, pues estuvo con fiebre y Álvaro llega preguntando por su hijo, frase que hiere en el orgullo a José Armando.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Camila sigue desaparecida y, junto con otras mujeres, es prisionera de un grupo de piratas. Vasco y Úrsula tienen un encuentro romántico. Camila se hace amiga de Jimena.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana: Conociendo a su familia
programme.desc: Ramiro le cuenta a Mariano que Ana Lucía es amante de Marcelo y que Ana Leticia sabe todo. Orlando le dice a Evaristo que no quiere terminar en la cárcel por la muerte de Daniel y Maribel escucha todo. Mariano se presenta con Ana Lucía como su tío.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Malas intenciones
programme.desc: Juan y sus hermanos encuentran el testamento de sus padres. Gabriela le deja en claro a Sofía que su amor por Fernando es lo más importante.

programme.title: Amores con trampa: Oferta de negocio
programme.desc: Carmen le pregunta a Felipe si está interesado en Hilda. Facundo le pide a Santiago que le venda las acciones que le quedan de la compañía. Porfirio le confiesa a Conchita que siempre ha tenido la esperanza de volverse a encontrar con su esposa.

programme.title: Pueblo de violencia
programme.desc: Cuando una bella joven es mancillada por el cacique del pueblo forma una banda que se dedica a cazar criminales.

programme.title: Las mulas del pueblo
programme.desc: Cuando un presidente municipal de un pueblo pequeño quiere vender una mula, empiezan los problemas porque la gente confunde el apodo de la mula con el de su hija.

programme.title: Johnny Chicano
programme.desc: Un joven campesino se enamora de la hija del patrón americano, trayendo problemas para su novia chicana y su familia.

programme.title: Los valientes de Guerrero
programme.desc: En un pueblo lleno de odio, donde las peleas con machetes están a la orden del día, un comisario trata de cambiar las costumbres violentas y traer paz.

programme.title: El pecado de ser pobre
programme.desc: Un ex presidiario ayuda a la joven que ama pues ella tiene que trabajar en un cabaret para mantener a su padre borracho.

programme.title: El sol sale para todos
programme.desc: Un novillero sufre un accidente durante una tarde de corrida en una plaza pueblerina, y su examante cuenta su historia.

programme.title: Flor Silvestre
programme.desc: José Luis, hijo de un hacendado, decide ir en contra de su familia casándose con Esperanza, una campesina humilde. Su padre lo echa de la casa para oponerse a la boda y porque se enteró que es parte de la Revolución Mexicana. Unos falsos revolucionarios, invaden la hacienda y asesinan al padre de José Luis, y así comienza una cadena de venganzas y tragedias.

programme.title: El sol sale para todos
programme.desc: Un novillero sufre un accidente durante una tarde de corrida en una plaza pueblerina, y su examante cuenta su historia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que no arriesga no gana
programme.desc: Hugo tiene autismo funcional. Emiliana, una compañera, intenta aprovecharse de él. Sin embargo, ella termina queriéndolo tal como es.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Tras tomar un taxi, Belinda, una joven modelo, es asesinada. El chofer es el principal sospechoso, sin embargo el culpable es alguien más.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Como que el tiempo dure, lugar tiene la esperanza
programme.desc: Paula pierde a su novio y Édgar su departamento como consecuencia de un terremoto. Ambos se apoyan mutuamente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De mal que el hombre teme, de ese se muere
programme.desc: Melina es hipocondríaca y no disfruta de la vida. Cuando cree tener cáncer visita el hospital y conoce a Martinillo, un médico de la risa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Jorge y Nico quieren ser populares y forman una banda. Pero Diego, un chico cuyo padre está enfermo, les enseña el sentido real de la música.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Mientras más profundo es el río, menos ruido hace
programme.desc: La madre de Paty es una actriz famosa. Por la presión que ejercen sobre ella, se vuelve anoréxica y termina en el hospital.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A buen sueño no hay cama dura
programme.desc: Sandra es apasionada del fútbol, pero su mamá quiere que se dedique al modelaje. Sandra demuestra que es capaz de cumplir su sueño.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Es de sabios perdonar injurias y olvidar agravios
programme.desc: Vladimir humilla a Miguel en la escuela. Él y su hermano lo amenazan con una pistola para darle una lección.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Grandes estrellas de la música acompañan a los pequeños en el reto de canto. La bailarina argentina, Laurita Fernández, se une como jueza invitada para calificar los retos de baile. Los capitanes rinden homenaje a Verónica Castro.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Es noche de sentencia y los cinco escuadrones darán lo mejor en el escenario. María León se une como invitada al panel de jueces. Los capitanes se enfrentan al reto de "Gali dice" para ganar un punto extra.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Es noche de eliminación y uno de los escuadrones deja la competencia. Los pequeños cumplen el reto de canto de Miguel Bosé con sorprendentes resultados. Los capitanes se enfrentan al reto del "Botonera".

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En una entrevista, el Papa Francisco da un regalo a los mexicanos con una charla amena donde fija la postura de la iglesia católica ante diferentes temas como la migración.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Desde una sobrecargo hasta una mariachi narran su experiencia en una vida donde no saben quiénes son. Personas transgénero que han nacido atrapados en un cuerpo que no es el suyo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Cordero y Venado se convirtieron en mejores amigos cuando iban a Estados Unidos como ilegales. Un coyote los vendió a una banda de traficantes de humanos y la familia de Venado pagó por su rescate.

programme.title: EXO 'Crown' MV
programme.desc: 'Crown' is a hard dance song that fuses Atlanta trap drums, heavy metal guitars, and EDM synths to break genre boundaries. Siren effects and powerful vocals heighten the dramatic tension, while the lyrics liken a precious loved one to a crown coveted by many, conveying a desperate resolve to protect them at all costs.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.”

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.EXO has returned with a new trailer.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip

BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle. With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.

programme.title: Al Jarreau, Tom Canning, Peter Robinson & Ralph Humphrey
programme.sub-title: Al Jarreau - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1981, American singer and Grammy Award winner Al Jarreau gave an unforgettable performance for the audience of the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague, the Netherlands.

programme.title: Jimmy Smith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Chet Baker
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential male jazz and pop vocalists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Delight in the expressive beauty and emotional depth of Chet Baker's rendition of “Time After Time” and “You Don't Know What Love Is", recorded live in Brussels, Belgium in 1964 and in Rome, Italy in 1956 respectively. Revel in Frank Sinatra's iconic version of “I've Got You Under My Skin". Immerse yourself in Dizzy Gillespie's dynamic performance of “Let Me Outta Here”, recorded live in Denmark in 1970. Enjoy Tony Bennett's unforgettable performance of “It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing)” at London's majestic Royal Albert Hall in 1974. Let the haunting beauty of Nat King Cole's 1957 performance of “Autumn Leaves” and Louis Armstrong's performance of “Basin Street Blues” from 1959 delight you. Dean Martin's smooth vocal stylings will enthrall you as he performs the jazz standard “Wrap Your Troubles In Dreams". Witness the electrifying energy of Sammy Davis Jr.'s performance of “Too Close For Comfort”. Join us for this unforgettable musical experience that you'll surely cherish!

programme.title: Count Basie
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1979, legendary big band leader and pianist Count Basie brought his famous big band to the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague to perform two sets. Basie, whose minimalist pianism and blues-oriented swing style had cemented his popularity as early as the 1930s, was in the midst of a European tour and had recorded his live album On the Road the previous night in Montreux, Switzerland. Here is the first of two sets recorded at the festival in 1979.

programme.title: Miles Davis
programme.desc: American trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) was a pioneering jazz musician from the late 1940s to the late 1980s. His influence on 20th century music is hard to overstate, as he trailblazed bebop, cool jazz, hardbop, modal jazz, and electronic music. On October 11, 1964, Miles Davis performed at Teatro Dell'Arte in Milan. With tenor saxophonist Wayne Shorter, pianist Herbie Hancock, bassist Ron Carter and drummer Tony Williams, Davis performed Autumn Leaves, My Funny Valentine, All Blues, All of You, and Joshua.

programme.title: Alex Dee
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Count Basie
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1979, legendary big band leader and pianist Count Basie brought his famous big band to the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague to perform two sets. Basie, whose minimalist pianism and blues-oriented swing style had cemented his popularity as early as the 1930s, was in the midst of a European tour and had recorded his live album 'On the Road' the previous night in Montreux, Switzerland. Here is the second of two sets recorded at the festival in 1979.

programme.title: Manu Dibango, Daniel Rallo, Jerry Malekani & Frederic Gaillardet
programme.sub-title: Soul Makossa: Manu Dibango in Stuttgart
programme.desc: Manu Dibango, one of Africa's biggest musical stars and top saxophonists, is an indispensable artist. He was one of the first African musicians to score a worldwide hit with his 1972 release “Soul Makossa”, paving the way for many other artists. The very concept of world music owes much to him. A superb stage performer with great communicative humour, Dibango is above all one of the founding fathers of a modern African musical style that is open to jazz, R&B, salsa, gospel, funk, and reggae. This concert showcases all these genres, and features an excellent line-up of musicians from the four corners of the planet.

programme.title: Seun Kuti
programme.desc: Seun Anikulapo Kuti possesses the grace, energy and fury of his father, the legendary artist Fela Kuti. With the musicians of Fela Kuti's legendary band Egypt 80, Seaun Kuti brings the most original incarnation of Afrobeat to life. Digging deep into different African traditions, Seun has brought his own touch to the music by reflecting the difficulties and cultures of the continent. Three-quarters of Egypt 80's current line-up is composed of musicians who didn't only play with Fela Kuti, but often were arrested and harassed alongside the founder of the Afrobeat.

programme.title: Mahler Chamber Orchestra & Barbara Hannigan
programme.sub-title: Barbara Hannigan: A Late Night Concert
programme.desc: Barbara Hannigan conducts the Mahler Chamber Orchestra in a concert recorded at the Lucerne Festival of 2014. There are pianists who also conduct, and concert masters who lead their orchestra from the violin desk, but a star soprano who coordinates an ensemble while at the same time negotiating the trickiest coloratura singing is something entirely new! This concert opens with the Overture from Rossini's La scala di seta, followed by three concert arias by Mozart: Vado, ma dove? O Dei!, K. 583, Un moto di gioia, K. 579 and Misera, dove son? K. 369. After renditions of György Ligeti's Concert Românesc and Mysteries of the Macabre, the concert closes with Fauré's Pelléas et Mélisande, Op. 80, a suite derived from incidental music.

programme.title: Julie Berthollet, Camille Berthollet, Guillaume Vincent & Ensemble Appassionato
programme.sub-title: Berthollet Sisters at Théâtre des Champs-Élysées
programme.desc: For this exceptional recital, recorded in 2019 at the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées, Camille (cello) and Julie Berthollet (violin) are accompanied by pianist Guillaume Vincent and the Ensemble Appassionato under the direction of Mathieu Herzog. The two musical sisters have chosen a repertoire which crosses genres and eras to explore the expressive palette of the violin and cello, from the baroque of Vivaldi to the jazzy notes of Django Reinhardt and Stéphane Grapelli. Among the works on the program are Brahms Hungarian Dances No. 5 and No. 6, Karl Jenkins' Palladio, 'Theme from Forrest Gump' by Alan Silvestri, Schumann's Piano Quintet, Op. 44, The Red Violin by Corigliano, Hungarian Rhapsody, op. 68 by Popper, Minor Swing by Reinhardt/Grappeli and Csárdás by Monti.

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.sub-title: The LSO performs Dvořák and Tchaikovsky
programme.desc: Sir Simon Rattle conducts the London Symphony Orchestra (LSO) in a concert program consisting of Antonín Dvořák's Scherzo Capriccioso in D-flat major, Op. 66, and selections from Act II of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's famous ballet The Nutcracker (1892). Dvořák's Scherzo Capriccioso (1883) reflects a period of personal crisis for the composer. The work betrays ever-changing moods and a constant sense of inner restlessness. In the music of The Nutcracker, Tchaikovsky combined memorable melodies with colorful orchestration, which has enchanted listeners for decades. This performance was recorded at LSO St Luke's in London, UK, on March 18, 2021.

programme.title: Roberto Abbado, Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma & Eleonora Buratto
programme.desc: Roberto Abbado conducts the Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, the Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma, and four vocal soloists in an outstanding performance of Giuseppe Verdi's Messa da Requiem, recorded at the Parco Ducale di Parma, Italy as part of Festival Verdi 2020. The soloists are soprano Eleonora Buratto, mezzosoprano Anita Rachvelishvili, tenor Giorgio Berrugi, and bass Roberto Tagliavini. When his fellow composer Gioachino Rossini died in 1868, Verdi proposed to compose a ‘Messa per Rossini' in his honor, to be written by himself and several other Italian composers. Verdi wrote the concluding movement, ‘Libera me'. When the premiere was cancelled, the project lay dormant. When Italian poet Alessandro Manzoni passed away a few years later, Verdi revisited his plan to compose a requiem – this time in honor of the poet he so greatly admired. As an opera composer, Verdi knew better than anyone how to infuse the work with drama, as is evident in the revised version of his ‘Libera me'. The famous, powerful ‘Dies Irae' especially stands out, depicting the horrors of the Last Judgement.

programme.desc: T in the Park festival is a major Scottish music festival that has been held almost annually since 1994 (the event did not take place in 2017). It is named after its main sponsor, the brewing company Tennents.

programme.desc: The Lumineers bring energetic American folk-rock to the picturesque Musilac Festival. You won't be able to resist clapping along and stomping your feet to the band's raw sound and enchanting music.

programme.desc: David Gilmour - Remember That Night: Live at the Royal Albert Hall is recorded by guitarist David Gilmour where he presents live tracks from the album On an Island and some hits from his former band Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Duane Allman
programme.desc: Duane Allman, the lead guitarist and driving force behind Southern Rock pioneers The Allman Brothers Band, lived a tragically short life, but during his brief career he changed music forever. With contributions from an illustrious and highly knowledgeable cast of friends, insiders and experts, plus rare footage and exclusive interviews, this film looks at Duane's life, work and musical output.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Beneath the Sea a compilation of spectacular underwater images from around the world. Captured in exclusively in 8K digital, Beneath the Sea features an award-winning original score by Alan Williams.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Coral Kingdoms was filmed on the kaleidoscopic reefs of Indonesia and the Maldives Islands.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Bejeweled Fishes captures the spectacular beauty of fishes inhabiting the coral reefs of the Tropical Pacific.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland II
programme.desc: Summertime in Iceland from an elevated perspective with "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle."

programme.title: Lush Vineyards: Portugal
programme.desc: Escape to the jaw-droppingly beautiful Douro Valley, Portugal's most scenic wine regions.

programme.title: Shark Paradise
programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sharks, for 80 minutes of Nature Relaxation. Captured by filmmaker collaborator Peter Schneider, Shark Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time scenes captured from around the world, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Relax Moods.

programme.title: Islands of Paradise w Music
programme.desc: Transform any TV or digital screen into a window to the beautiful Yasawa islands of Fiji, with this one hour-long, soothing visual journey. Palm trees, tropical lagoons, birds chirping, waves lapping, golden sunsets and fiery sunrises are just a few of the scenes in store for the viewer. Enjoy nearly all the benefits of a relaxing tropical vacation from the comfort of your home!

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 1
programme.desc: Transport your senses to the rugged yet exquisitely beautiful Big Sur coast of California to relax & absorb the healing sights and sounds of McWay Falls from a unique and rare perspective. Filmed more than a decade ago and remastered for maximum color and quality, "A Day in Big Sur" showcases the timeless beauty of this magical destination and attempts to truly capture the spirit of this natural paradise through the use of 50+ artistically framed video perspectives - all featuring real stereo nature sounds for an immersive relaxation experience.

programme.title: Northland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: Tag along with us while we traverse the Northland region's pristine beaches that showcase the diverse natural beauty of New Zealand's coastline. Bask in the unspoiled scenery of sandy shores, clear waters, and stunning natural landscapes.

programme.title: Purple Mountain Wildflowers
programme.desc: Purple Mountain Wildflowers offers a full 1-hour immersion into a field of purple lupine flowers in full bloom on a perfect sunny day with bits of clouds and rain appearing - with nature sounds.

programme.title: Pure Relaxation
programme.desc: Relax to the slow descent of the sun over calm waters.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Self-taught artist MJ On The Wall blends geometry, afro-futurism, and color symbolism to explore the African diaspora's past, present, and future. Discover how the engineer-turned-artist tells long-form stories through his intricate narratives.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: A fusion of the diverse artistic styles & visions of our featured artists. Erni Vales unleashes imagination with surreal creations that transport you to another world while Sam Heydt challenges perspectives with thought-provoking conceptual art.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Explore the floral motion art of Jennifer Panepinto (QuantumSpirit). Her work blends AI and digital editing to explore memory and consciousness through bold color, intricate texture, and symbolic motifs. A visually textured, emotionally resonant collection.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Experience the abstract motion art of Dennis Miller, a visual artist with a composer's background. He translates musical principles like rhythm and structure into imagery, transforming photographs into emotionally deep, non-representational works of art.

programme.title: ART Buzz
programme.desc: Step into a realm of electrifying fashion and avant-garde creativity with this high-energy collection. Unleashing the boundless imagination with cutting-edge art that redefines fashion's limits and leaves an indelible mark on the world of style.

programme.title: ART Buzz
programme.desc: A vibrant collection celebrating the creativity of Asian Pacific Islander Desi American artists. Blending ancestral influences with modern expression, each piece captures the dynamic intersection of tradition, identity, and the evolving artistic landscape.

programme.title: ART Buzz
programme.desc: A powerful art collection capturing the vibrant essence of queer identities, experiences, and perspectives within the LGBTQ+ community. Bouncing basslines, punchy drum kits, and house-driven melodies add to the atmosphere of freedom and joy.

programme.title: ART In Season
programme.desc: Celebrate the dawn of a sparkling New Year with elegant strokes of white, silver, and gold. The artwork create a harmonious symphony of sophistication and hope, radiating a sense of renewal and opulence.

programme.title: ART In Season
programme.desc: Experience an electric celebration under glowing lights. This art collection pulses with fluorescent energy and vibrant color, capturing the intense joy of fresh starts and the radiant anticipation of the year ahead.
